parameters.query: SELECT bc.location_id, bc.brand_name, bc.meta_dataset_id, bc.meta_access_token, bc.meta_ad_account_id FROM brand_configs bc WHERE bc.location_id = '{{ $('Webhook CAPI Purchase').first().json.body.location_id || $('Webhook CAPI Purchase').first().json.location_id }}' AND bc.meta_dataset_id IS NOT NULL AND bc.meta_access_token IS NOT NULL LIMIT 1

INSERT INTO capi_events_log (location_id, event_name, event_id, opportunity_id, contact_id, dataset_id, monetary_value, currency, response_code, response_body, sent_at) VALUES ('{{ $('Build Purchase Event').first().json.location_id }}', 'Purchase', '{{ $('Build Purchase Event').first().json.event_id }}', '{{ $('Build Purchase Event').first().json.opportunity_id }}', '{{ $('Build Purchase Event').first().json.contact_id }}', '{{ $('Build Purchase Event').first().json.dataset_id }}', {{ $('Build Purchase Event').first().json.monetary_value }}, '{{ $('Build Purchase Event').first().json.currency }}', '{{ $('Send CAPI Event').first().json.events_received || 0 }}', '{{ JSON.stringify($('Send CAPI Event').first().json) }}'::TEXT, NOW())
